package.name: cross_consistency_observer
package.description: Cross-consistency observer for G1 ROS2 Pipeline. Detects incoherence between PRIMARY authority sources. Publishes SafetyEvent to /safety_events. Publishes heartbeat to /diagnostics. Defined by ADR-003 + SAFETY_MODEL_G1.md Sección 7. Thresholds TBD — pending SDK G1. Does NOT modify /system_state. Does NOT execute transitions.
